top_signals.title: Goldman Says Global Oil Stockpiles Falling at Record Pace on War
top_signals.summary: Global stockpiles of crude oil and products are being drawn down at a record pace this month as the war in the Middle East drags on, curtailing supplies, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SEC’s ‘Crypto Mom’ to join law school, signaling end of time at regulator
top_signals.summary: Hester Peirce will become an associate professor at a Virginia law school some 18 months after her term at the SEC expired, leaving another empty seat in the agency’s leadership.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Ex-Japan Post worker arrested over alleged bribery case
top_signals.summary: Nobuyuki Yoneda allegedly received cash and other benefits from a contractor in exchange for facilitating a consignment contract to collect letters and other items from mailboxes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
